commits.subject: Day 107 (02:32): Sanitize search tool input against grep-incompatible flags (Task 2)

eval.reason: Implementation adds `rejected_flags` field to `GrepArgs`, intercepts --json/--jsonl/--null/-Z/--only-matching/-o/--format/--max-count/-m with clear error messages, silently ignores --color/--no-color, preserves all valid flags (-s/-C/--include/etc.), and includes 10 focused tests covering each rejection case plus multi-flag scenarios. All 136 commands_search tests pass.

task_file_title: Sanitize search tool input against grep-incompatible flags
